creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #3)

> This is truly interesting, but how is a user supposed to know this?
There is document for boot process in detail. See the handbook [1].
Well that does not mention bhyveload(8), but I think it is a good start point :)

>bhyveload(8) does not mention this. This really needs to be documented.
bhyveload(8) is for system managers. IMO it burdens if includes too many low level details.

Also CC Doug and the author Neel.


1. https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/boot/#boot-introduction
